mapper.sql: A.WORD_ID AS wordId , A.WORD_NM AS wordNm , A.ENG_NM AS engNm , A.WORD_DC AS wordDc , A.SYNONM AS synonm , (SELECT B.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER B WHERE B.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS emplyrNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

if.if: AND (A.WORD_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%') OR A.ENG_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_WORD_DICARY_INFO A WHERE 1=1
